title: helichrysum amorginum
intro: Helichrysum amorginum, also known as Immortelle or Everlasting Flower, is a flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Helichrysum amorginum include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as having a protective effect on the liver and digestive system. Helichrysum amorginum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including essential oils, capsules, and teas, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, stress, and insomnia, as well as to promote overall well-being.
